wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-text: Use this page to experiment with the MediaWiki REST APIs. API calls made through the sandbox interface will interact with live wiki content and may modify the wiki. Refer to the [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/API:REST_API API documentation] for further details about API usage.
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-disc:
Have feedback about this sandbox? Please leave it [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/MediaWiki_Interfaces_Team/Feature_Feedback/REST_Sandbox here].
Note: sandbox UI and navigation items do not yet support translation.
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-no-s: No REST APIs were configured for exploration. Use the RestSandboxSpecs setting.
The given API parameter is not supported: $1
wikimediacustomizations-restsandbox-json: JavaScript is required to view the REST specification.
